| native_name = 忍骨命神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Oshihoneno Shrine'''|忍骨命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oshihoneno Shrine'''|忍骨命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshihoneno Shrine'''|忍骨命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Oshihoneno Shrine
| native_name = 忍骨命神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Oshihoneno Shrine

| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]

{{nihongo|'''Oshihoneno Shrine'''|忍骨命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}

{{nihongo|'''Oshihoneno Shrine'''|忍骨命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshihoneno Shrine'''|忍骨命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].

revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Oshihoneno Shrine | native_name = 忍骨命神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Oshihoneno Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.669638|130.840294}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Oshihoneno Shrine'''|忍骨命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Buzen Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
